Error Management.name: EFLG

fields.name: RX1OVR
fields.description: Receive Buffer 1 Overflow Flag bit - Set when a valid message is received for RXB1 and CANINTF.RX1IF = 1 - Must be reset by MCU

fields.name: RX0OVR
fields.description: Receive Buffer 0 Overflow Flag bit - Set when a valid message is received for RXB0 and CANINTF.RX0IF = 1 - Must be reset by MCU

fields.name: TXBO
fields.description: Bus-Off Error Flag bit - Bit set when TEC reaches 255 - Reset after a successful bus recovery sequence

fields.name: TXEP
fields.description: Transmit Error-Passive Flag bit - Set when TEC is equal to or greater than 128 - Reset when TEC is less than 128

fields.name: RXEP
fields.description: Receive Error-Passive Flag bit - Set when REC is equal to or greater than 128 - Reset when REC is less than 128

fields.name: TXWAR
fields.description: Transmit Error Warning Flag bit - Set when TEC is equal to or greater than 96 - Reset when TEC is less than 96

fields.name: RXWAR
fields.description: Receive Error Warning Flag bit - Set when REC is equal to or greater than 96 - Reset when REC is less than 96

fields.name: EWARN
fields.description: Error Warning Flag bit - Set when TEC or REC is equal to or greater than 96 (TXWAR or RXWAR = 1 ) - Reset when both REC and TEC are less than 96

fields.name: MERRE
fields.description: Message Error Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt on error during message reception or transmission. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: WAKIE
fields.description: Wakeup Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt on CAN bus activity. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: ERRIE
fields.description: Error Interrupt Enable bit (multiple sources in EFLG register). 1 = Interrupt on EFLG error condition change. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: TX2IE
fields.description: Transmit Buffer 2 Empty Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt on TXB2 becoming empty. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: TX1IE
fields.description: Transmit Buffer 1 Empty Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt on TXB1 becoming empty. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: TX0IE
fields.description: Transmit Buffer 0 Empty Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt on TXB0 becoming empty. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: RX1IE
fields.description: Receive Buffer 1 Full Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt when message received in RXB1. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: RX0IE
fields.description: Receive Buffer 0 Full Interrupt Enable bit. 1 = Interrupt when message received in RXB0. 0 = Disabled

fields.name: MERRF
fields.description: Message Error Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: WAKIF
fields.description: Wakeup Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: ERRIF
fields.description: Error Interrupt Flag bit (multiple sources in EFLG register). 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: TX2IF
fields.description: Transmit Buffer 2 Empty Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: TX1IF
fields.description: Transmit Buffer 1 Empty Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: TX0IF
fields.description: Transmit Buffer 0 Empty Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: RX1IF
fields.description: Receive Buffer 1 Full Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: RX0IF
fields.description: Receive Buffer 0 Full Interrupt Flag bit. 1 = Interrupt pending (must be cleared by MCU to reset interrupt condition). 0 = No interrupt pending

fields.name: ABTF
fields.description: Message Aborted Flag bit. 1 = Message was aborted, 0 = Message completed transmission successfully.

fields.name: MLOA
fields.description: Message Lost Arbitration bit. 1 = Message lost arbitration while being sent, 0 = Message did not lose arbitration while being sent.

fields.name: TXERR
fields.description: Transmission Error Detected bit. 1 = A bus error occurred while the message was being transmitted, 0 = No bus error occurred while the message was being transmitted.

fields.name: TXREQ
fields.description: Message Transmit Request bit. 1 = Buffer is currently pending transmission. 0 = Buffer is not currently pending transmission.

RX Buffers.name: RXBnSIDL

fields.name: SID
fields.description: Standard Identifier bits <2:0> – These bits contain the three least significant bits of the Standard Identifier for the received message

fields.name: SRR
fields.description: Standard Frame Remote Transmit Request bit (valid only if IDE bit = '0') – 1 = Standard Frame Remote Transmit Request Received, 0 = Standard Data Frame Received

fields.name: IDE
fields.description: Extended Identifier Flag bit – Indicates whether the received message was a Standard or an Extended Frame. 1 = Received message was an Extended Frame, 0 = Received message was a Standard Frame

fields.name: EID
fields.description: Extended Identifier bits <17:16> – These bits contain the two most significant bits of the Extended Identifier for the received message
